    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics schemaOpaqueInstanceMember:warning
    import { Schema } from "effect"
    
    class User extends Schema.Opaque<User>()(Schema.Struct({ name: Schema.String })) {
      displayName = "User"
      ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377102: Classes extending `Schema.Opaque` must not declare instance members. effect(schemaOpaqueInstanceMember)
